<!-- Thanks for contributing! Fill in what applies. -->

## What's in this PR
- [ ] New recipe
- [ ] New author profile
- [ ] Update to an existing recipe
- [ ] Site / layout / docs change

## Recipe checklist (if adding a recipe)
- [ ] File is under `content/recipes/<section>/<slug>.md`
- [ ] Required frontmatter is filled in: `title`, `authors`, `cuisine`, `servings`, `prep_time`, `cook_time`, `ingredients`
- [ ] Author profile exists at `content/authors/<author>/_index.md`
- [ ] Checked the Cloudflare Pages preview URL (link will appear below once built)
- [ ] Print preview looks clean
